name: clear-pr
description: Write PR titles and descriptions in anandyandawang's house style. Title: a lowercase imperative summary, like a commit subject (no ticket prefix). Body: `## What` (one or two lines of high-level outcome, not a diff summary) then `## Why` (the context the diff can't show — trigger, constraint, decision, alternatives). The diff already shows what changed and how; the description carries the high-level what and the why. Link evidence instead of inlining, backtick every code identifier, be honest about tradeoffs, and size the description to the change. Applies automatically whenever Claude opens a pull request or drafts a PR description; invoke /clear-pr to apply the format on demand.
